A topical balm or cream made from Aesculus hippocastanum is often used to alleviate symptoms of varicose veins and spider veins due to its anti-inflammatory properties. The active compound, aescin, is believed to help reduce swelling and improve circulation. When applied topically, this balm or cream may provide relief and promote overall skin health.
